title: Sam — the breakup confrontation script (Jaden lie, trust shattered)
html:
Sam — the breakup confrontation script (Jaden lie, trust shattered)

Source: 2024-04-27 Apple Note. The most raw breakup-prep document in the corpus — Yahir drafting line-by-line what to say to Sam after she lied to his face about something with "Jaden." Roughly 7 weeks before the long Asia trip notebook starts.

TL;DR

  • Breakup script triggered by the "Jaden situation" — Sam apparently told Yahir at one point she'd already told him something, then dropped news, then explicitly lied when asked if she'd slept with Jaden.
  • "feel humiliated that I iterated 'I trust you' when you looked me in the eyes and lied. You weren't trustworthy and I should've trusted my intuition" — the trust-as-shattered-glass framing.
  • "We've both really hurt each other and I wish we can both heal from this" — controlled forgiveness language.
  • Two-part doc: bullet rationale on top + a more polished "letter version" below. Same drafting pattern as the work resignation drafts from 2021.
  • The closing line: "I have no intentions of seeing anyone else for the foreseeable future" — Yahir holds himself to a 30-day no-dating rule after.
  • Sam reappears in the July note ("Don't want to admit it bc it feels like I'm succumbing to something. But I still think about Sam, a lot").

Key quote

"I want to be with someone that I don't have to tell them what they should already know."

"I long to get far from the shallow, into the deepene"

Pattern observed

This + 2024 07 06 still thinking about sam + the recurring "call the cops about the Sam situation" lines in 2024 07 04 questions form a post-breakup arc. The 2024 Sam saga directly precedes the China chapter decision later that year — leaving the country was partly leaving Sam.

Open questions

  • Who is "Jaden"?
  • Was the "call the cops about the Sam situation" line literal — did it escalate to legal/safety territory? (Note: he later prints a stalking order.)

  • post breakup conflict
